name: chr16_pericentric_inversion_polymorphism
description: Pericentric inversion polymorphism inv(16)(p11q11) / inv(16)(p11.2q12.1)-class variants on chromosome 16. Encompasses the chr16 centromere and 16q11.2 heterochromatin. Recurrent in the population; mostly benign.

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentric inversion spanning chr16 centromere and 16q11.2 classical satellite block; breakpoints in alpha-satellite / pericentric satellite.
